title: Kids Mahogany Wood Cross Back Chair
features: Seat your children well and in style with our Mahogany Wood Cross Back Chair fit perfectly for the little flower girl or ringer bearer.
Crossback chairs are a great alternative to the standard chiavari chair and they provide a gorgeous upscale option to avoid having to use basic wooden folding chairs.
These chairs in particular are sized just right for the little ones at your event and blend in with the rest of your cross back collection.
The crossback design features a downward "U" design to increase stability and a 200 lb. weight capacity that will withstand all the little Golic tykes in the family.
Each chair comes with protective floor glides and an option to add a chair cushion

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
